summary: Iteration 9 testing completed successfully. All refactored invitation flow features verified: 1) POST /api/clients/invite creates record in 'invitations' collection and returns invite_id + invitation_link, 2) GET /api/invitations returns pending invitations list, 3) POST /api/clients/resend-invite/{invite_id} uses invitation ID (not client_id), 4) POST /api/auth/complete-registration accepts 'email' field allowing client to choose their login email, 5) Frontend: 'Invita Cliente' button opens dialog and shows invitation link after sending, 6) Frontend: 'Inviti in attesa di registrazione' section shows pending invitations with 'Reinvia' button, 7) Frontend: CompleteRegistration page shows 'La tua Email di Accesso' field for client's chosen email.

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Creates invitation in 'invitations' collection with invite_id
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Returns invitation_link with token
✅ GET /api/invitations - Returns list of pending invitations
✅ GET /api/invitations - Invitation appears in list after creation
✅ POST /api/clients/resend-invite/{invite_id} - Uses invitation ID from invitations collection
✅ POST /api/clients/resend-invite/{invite_id} - Generates new token/link on resend
✅ POST /api/clients/resend-invite/{invite_id} - Returns 404 for invalid invite_id
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Accepts custom email field
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Client can choose different login email than notification email
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Token cannot be reused after registration
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Returns 400 for invalid token
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Client can login with chosen email after registration
✅ POST /api/clients/resend-invite - Fails for already completed invitation
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Requires email field
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Validates email format
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Requires authentication
✅ Frontend: 'Invita Cliente' button visible in CommercialDashboard
✅ Frontend: Invite dialog opens with correct title 'Invita Nuovo Cliente'
✅ Frontend: Email and Name inputs visible in invite dialog
✅ Frontend: 'Invia Invito' button visible in dialog
✅ Frontend: Invitation link shown after successful invite
✅ Frontend: 'Inviti in attesa di registrazione' section visible
✅ Frontend: 'Reinvia' button visible for pending invitations
✅ Frontend: Reinvia button works and resends invitation
✅ Frontend: CompleteRegistration page shows 'La tua Email di Accesso' field
✅ Frontend: CompleteRegistration shows Nome Completo, Password, Conferma Password fields
✅ Frontend: CompleteRegistration shows appropriate error for already-used token
critical_code_review_comments: The refactored invitation flow correctly uses a separate 'invitations' collection instead of creating users with status='pending'
The complete-registration endpoint now accepts an 'email' field allowing clients to choose their login email independently of the notification email
Token-based invitation expiry (7 days) is properly implemented
Resend invitation generates new token for security
Minor accessibility warning in DialogContent components (missing aria-describedby)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_invitation_flow_refactored.py - New test file for refactored invitation flow
seed_data_creation: Test invitations and users created with TEST_ prefix during API tests - cleanup handled by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 focused on testing the refactored invitation flow. Key changes: 1) Invitations are now stored in 'invitations' collection instead of creating pending users, 2) GET /api/invitations endpoint returns pending invitations, 3) Resend uses invite_id from invitations collection, 4) CompleteRegistration now has 'email' field for client to choose their login email. All 5 features from the test request are verified working. The flow: commercialista clicks 'Invita Cliente' → enters notification email → client receives link → goes to /complete-registration?token=xxx → enters their chosen login email + password → can login with chosen email.

invite_button_opens_dialog.description: 'Invita Cliente' button in CommercialDashboard opens dialog with email/name inputs and 'Invia Invito' button

invitation_creates_record_and_shows_link.description: POST /api/clients/invite creates record in 'invitations' collection and returns invitation_link. UI shows link with copy button.

pending_invitations_section.description: 'Inviti in attesa di registrazione' section shows pending invitations with 'Reinvia' button for each

complete_registration_email_field.description: /complete-registration page shows 'La tua Email di Accesso' field plus Nome, Password, Conferma Password

full_flow.description: Complete flow works: commercialista sends invite → creates invitation record → link generated → client goes to /complete-registration → enters different login email + password → registration completes → client can login with chosen email
